# robots.txt for Mgr. Markéta Protivová - Advokátka

# Allow all crawlers
User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Canonical host
Host: www.marketaprotivova.cz

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://www.marketaprotivova.cz/sitemap.xml

# Optional: do not crawl URL parameters generated by analytics campaigns
Disallow: /*?utm_
